features: QUALITY & PERFORMANCE: A premium hair styling clay for men that gives you a high-hold, matte finish with no flakes or fuss. It has a very subtle citrusy scent with a hint of musk. An all-natural aroma for every man.
NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Made with natural, vegan, cruelty free ingredients. No animal testing. Also free from parabens, silicones, colourants, and synthetic fragrances.
WATER-BASED & WATER-SOLUBLE: Offering a strong hold, it is water based with a perfect blend of butters, waxes, and oils that washes off easily.
FLEXIBLE, NATURAL HOLD: Offering a high hold that is flexible, it applies easily to dry or damp hair for a natural non-greasy look.

GENTLEMEN'S GROOMING ESSENTIALS: Simple and easy to use, this is a no fuss and no mess hair styling product that leaves your hair shiny, happy, and looking its best. Made in England with the highest quality and safety standards.
description: Product Description Help the hair on top of your head stay where you want it under any circumstance with the Seven Potions Men's Hair Styling Clay . Sweat, wind, heat, you name it. This styling clay pomade offers you styled hair no matter the situation. Simple to use, to achieve style victory simply apply this high yet flexible-hold clay to dry or damp hair. A no-brainer for any man who wants great-looking hair. Complete with a naturally derived subtle aroma; Never overpowering to your senses, its subtle fragrance is expertly developed to blend with your favorite cologne, shampoo, or natural scent. The best part: Seven Potions clay is made with premium ingredients. This unique product is designed to help hair of any length stay in place. It is water-based and delivers a matte finish and is much more flexible than standard hair gel. Made for men that live life to the fullest. What is Hair Styling Clay? Clay is a very versatile product that gives your hair a flexible high hold made to last all day. Hair clays most commonly contain, kaolin and bentonite clays, naturally-occurring substances which is a form of volcanic ash. Bentonite has actually been used for centuries as a healing clay. This matte hair wax also serves as a basis for a product that is hugely beneficial to your hair’s health, potentially boosting your hair's health and nourishing the scalp. Hair clay also impressively boosts your hair's volume, and can be used on medium to long hair. The matte finish is ideal for men who prefer a natural looks without the wet-shine appearance of gels, mousse and wax. INVIGORATING TO ALL YOUR SENSES Effortless and natural, Seven Potions Hair Styling Clay delivers more than just styled hair. This styling clay is captivating and manly with a subtle aroma blend of bergamot, ylang-ylang, and sandalwood. Its fresh smell mixed with calming musk after-notes will have you reaching for this clay day after day. Made for men that live life to the fullest. Reaching for this clay day after day is a no-brainer. Perfect for your pocket Housed in a 3.4 fl oz / 100 ml round tin, storage and travel with this clay is simple. You won't have to miss a day with this hair styling clay. How to Apply Seven Potions Hair Styling Clay is simple to use The key to successfully using hair clay is warmth, for both activating its ingredients and making it easier to deposit throughout your hair. Begin by giving your hair a quick blow dry, already styling it in your chosen direction. Or, keep hair slightly damp for a bit more shine. One benefit of styling clay is that doesn’t set or harden, meaning that - if needs be - you can subsequently rework your style throughout the day. Take a penny-sized amount of clay and rub it between your palms until it’s nice and warm. Work from the back as you style your hair, adding more product as you go. If you’re going for a strict slick-back or a parted look, you can use a comb to finish up. ALL SEVEN POTIONS HAIR CARE, BEARD CARE AND SHAVING PRODUCTS ARE PROUDLY MADE IN THE UK 12 Reasons why you should choose Seven Potions Styling Clay Developed to smooth and style your hair with a matte finish. High and flexible hold. Stays in place, even during workouts and bad weather. Doesn't harden or create crunchy hair. Re-style as needed throughout the day. Non-greasy, non-oily, non-flaky, non-damaging and won't clump. Water-based formula is easy to wash out. Easy to apply, and only a small amount is needed to style your hair as desired. Great for all hair types. No parabens, no artificial fragrances and no colourants. Contains natural, and vegan friendly ingredients. Developed with top-quality ingredients and made with performance in mind. Use with or without other Seven Potions hair care products and shampoo. Seven Potions focuses on the product and the whole grooming experience, for the discerning man who wants only the best. Choose the Seven Potions Hair Styling Clay to help you confidently enhance your daily rituals. PREMIUM ENGLISH BRAND FOR GENTLEMEN About the Seven Potions Brand Seven Potions has had a particular mission ever since its inception: To develop and produce premium men's grooming products that are made of pure, natural ingredients with superior performance . Seven Potions hopes to help men foster confidence and improve the way they look. Each product is carefully curated by quality suppliers that meet the highest standards, ensuring that your grooming care products are made to be the best. Seven Potions will never compromise quality and performance to offer an inferior product. Seven Potions believes that men who care about their grooming regime are equally conscious about making wise choices for the Earth. A Bit of History The brand Seven Potions was conceived in 2014, after testing hundreds of different grooming formulations out there. The makers of Seven Potions were fed up with companies that produced men's grooming products that didn't respect any safety and quality standards. They realised many companies were offering poor quality and potentially dangerous products. The Seven Potions vision is to offer unique, premium products for beard grooming, hair styling and wet shaving that allow men to upgrade their daily grooming routine, their appearance and ultimately improve their self-confidence. This one-of-a-kind product offering always comes with tremendous respect and gratitude towards every single customer that puts their faith and support in the Seven Potions company. Seven Potions also believes that men who care about their grooming regime are also conscious about making wise choices for the Earth. Without the customer's trust, we would be nowhere near where we are today. Help the hair on top of your head stay where you want it under any circumstance. Always looking fresh and ready to tackle any task; a smart man's answer to hair styling. To revive limp and lifeless hair. This matte spray elevates your style by adding grit and texture to clean hair. Brush to get rid of beard dandruff and impurities. An excellent choice for any and all beard lengths, thicknesses and styles. A great gift to cover all beard grooming needs. Vegan ✓ ✓ ✓ no data ✓ N/A Directions Rub a small amount of styling clay between your palms for a few seconds and apply on clean, dry or damp hair. Rub a small amount of styling pomade between your palms for a few seconds and apply on clean, dry or damp hair. Spray evenly, starting at the roots on damp or dry hair. Restyle freely with your fingers and apply higher amount, if necessary. Brush your beard on the desired direction for taming, softening or cleaning. Can be used as hair pocket comb when you're on the go. Beard Oil: Apply 2-10 drops in your palms and massage into your beard and skin. Beard Shampoo: Apply the shampoo on a wet beard just like regular shampoo. Massage through your facial hair and skin as long as you deem appropriate and rinse off.
